surface.name: Mistral Developer API via cURL chat completions (Studio Free mode)
surface.selection_basis: Mistral's Activate Studio guide states Studio is enabled in Free mode by default with no credit card required, and an API key can be generated for model calls. The API reference documents cURL to https://api.mistral.ai/v1/chat/completions. The Developer 'Send your first API request' quickstart centers the SDK, but an SDK install is not required when using the documented HTTPS chat-completions call with a Bearer key.

alternatives_considered.name: Python / TypeScript SDK first-request quickstart
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: Optional client libraries; the same chat-completions endpoint is documented with cURL in the API reference.

alternatives_considered.name: Studio API playground
alternatives_considered.reason_not_primary: In-browser playground path before a programmatic API call.

entry_point.developer_intent: Create a Mistral account, enable Studio Free mode, generate an API key, and complete a chat-completions request over HTTPS without installing an SDK.
assumed_prior_state: No Mistral account or API key is assumed.
A terminal with cURL is available; no language SDK is assumed.

documented_first_success.normalized_outcome: An authenticated cURL POST to https://api.mistral.ai/v1/chat/completions returns chat-completion model output.
documented_first_success.observable_completion_signal: The HTTP response body includes assistant message content for the requested prompt.

boundary_evidence.official_label_or_terminal_state: Studio Free mode enables API access without a credit card. The API reference documents cURL https://api.mistral.ai/v1/chat/completions with a Bearer API key.

documented_first_success.why_this_is_the_boundary: The first meaningful LLM success is a successful authenticated chat-completions response. Free mode does not require a credit card. Installing mistralai is optional because the same endpoint is documented with cURL.

prerequisites.requirement: A Mistral AI account that can open Studio.
A Mistral API key created in Studio, copied immediately, and exported as MISTRAL_API_KEY.
A terminal with cURL (or any HTTP client). No language SDK is required for the HTTPS first call.

primary_path.action: Open the Developer first-API-request quickstart and follow its API-key prerequisite link.
primary_path.success_signal: Activate Studio and generate an API key is reachable.

primary_path.action: Create or sign in to a Mistral account and open Studio.
details: Studio Free mode is enabled by default with no credit card required; usage and rate limits apply.
primary_path.input: Intent to use the Developer API
primary_path.output: Authenticated Studio session in Free mode
primary_path.success_signal: API key creation controls are reachable.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Follow the displayed account recovery path.

primary_path.action: Create a new API key, copy the secret immediately, and store it securely.
details: Open Studio API keys and select Create new key.
Name the key and copy the secret before leaving the page.
primary_path.success_signal: The key value is saved locally.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: If the secret is lost, create a new key.

primary_path.output: Shell environment ready for authenticated HTTP
primary_path.success_signal: MISTRAL_API_KEY is set in the current shell.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Shell persistence depends on the OS.

primary_path.action: POST a chat-completions request with cURL to https://api.mistral.ai/v1/chat/completions.
details: Include Authorization: Bearer $MISTRAL_API_KEY and Content-Type: application/json.
Send a JSON body with model and messages as shown in the API reference cURL example.
primary_path.success_signal: The API returns a successful JSON body containing assistant message content.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: Missing key, Free-mode rate limits, or invalid JSON produce API errors.

primary_path.action: Confirm the chat-completions JSON includes assistant message content.
primary_path.success_signal: Assistant content is present in the successful response.
primary_path.failure_or_wait: An error body means the first call did not succeed.

branches.condition: The developer prefers the official Python or TypeScript SDK.
branches.path: Install mistralai (or the TypeScript client), set MISTRAL_API_KEY, and run the published chat.complete example; the API key and Free-mode limits stay the same.
branches.effect_on_first_success: Adds optional local package installation without changing the authenticated chat-completions boundary.

friction_gates.description: API access requires a Mistral account with Studio enabled.
Studio Free mode is enabled by default with no credit card required; usage and rate limits apply.
The API key secret is shown once and must be stored safely.

time_to_first_success.value: ~5 minutes (vendor claim on first-API-request quickstart; assumes SDK path)

sources.title: Activate Studio and generate an API key
Test a model in the API playground

uncertainties.question: Exact Free-mode rate-limit and quota values for a brand-new account on the day of research.
uncertainties.impact: Could cause the first cURL call to fail with a rate-limit error before any billing upgrade.
uncertainties.reason_unresolved: Free-mode pages state that usage and rate limits apply without enumerating the numeric Free-mode matrix on the researched pages.
